reviews.review_description: My friend couldnt shut up about this game, so i gave it a try. No menu, no tutorial, not suitable for sitting, terrible controls, ciuldnt stop at the customer, and everything gets in the way. I do not recomend. 👎
I cant do the job right! The damadge thing is so annoying! I thought it was a free-driving expirence, but i got scammed! Please remake it.
The clarity was amazing and it was not uncomfortable we are trying the game must buy

This Tuk Tuk Auto Rickshaw VR game is pure fun and realism combined! 🛺🔥 From the moment I sat in the driver’s seat, I felt like I was actually on the busy streets of my country – dodging traffic, picking up passengers, honking through tight lanes, and handling the rickshaw's bumpy rides.

Driving a Tuk Tuk in real life is already an adventure, but stepping into a Virtual Reality tuk tuk simulator takes that adventure to an entirely new level of fun, chaos, and immersion. From the moment you put on the headset, you’re transported into the bustling streets filled with honking vehicles, pedestrians crossing carelessly, sharp turns, and endless challenges that test your reflexes and driving skills.
Driving the tuk tuk feels responsive and smooth. You can feel the rumble on bumpy roads, and picking up passengers and dodging through narrow streets keeps things exciting
I cant tern the weel in stop

developer_response.body:
Hi Napalm85,
Sorry you had bad experince in game. Please try now latest version is live now. Its total bug free with new levels.
Thanks.

reviews.review_description: Wow!!! Tuk Tuk auto Rickshaw is an amazing game.. l enjoyed it very much. It is easy for use. During my free time I enjoy it. I like this game very much😍😍😍
The tuk tuk auto rickshaw game is staggeringly habit-forming! The ongoing interaction is quick moving, and the sensible material science cause it to feel like you're really driving a tuk.

The city is a bit creepy and dead (as are the passengers), and the controls could do with some work, but hey - it does what it says on the tin, you ARE a Tuk Tuk driver!

You can see some gameplay video I made below (remove the space before 'be' in the URL):

https://youtu. be/GhgHIWr2TV0?si=r9xvk6cFFaaQbDFJ

developer_response.body:
Hello! BallsyVR, Thanks for feedbake and support Actually we have updated the game with major improvement and features, Please try new version.
Thanks.

reviews.review_description: I agree with the first person's review, I've had that very same problem.  However, if you can fix these issues with steering the car, I will certainly  update this review with something positive.  I wanted to really like this game but it has too many issues with the steering and other controls with the car, I can tell this would be an awesome game to play if you can fix that for us.  Thanks much..

reviews.review_description: Game transports players into the heart of a tuk tuk auto rickshaw adventure. Despite a few areas with room for improvement, the overall experience is highly enjoyable and offers a unique perspective on virtual reality gaming. Hop on board and prepare yourself for an unforgettable ride through exotic landscape!

This isn't a game, this is a university homework for a class that you just wanna pass.

The graphics are very low effort, tho it does not cause discomfort. The environment is very generic, I kinda felt out of place. 

Driving does not feel like driving. The controls describe it well, it's forward and backward force instead of accelerate and brake pedals. As someone who drives 50ccm quite regularly, the acceleration feels closer to a low effort bicycle start compared to anything motor assisted.
Braking half of the time simply does not work, but when it does it's still less effective then leaving a car in gear and coasting.
The feeling of speed does not exits, other cars might be going at a good jogging speed, and when you accelerate to a reasonable speed the streets are way too narrow. It's more suitable for a relaxed biking compared to a low speed vehicle. 

Also, the GPS is so zoomed in, that you don't have time to react to turns.

developer_response.body:

Thanks.

reviews.review_description: Fix the steering and how the buildings look. I really like how the vehicle looks but the buildings and ai passengers could get more realistic. Good game overall if you want to see the video of me rating the game on YouTube: Gft drift
